identity.name: Srinivasa Sowmiyan
identity.headline: Backend Engineer | Java, Spring, Microservices | Kafka | Kubernetes | AWS | Distributed Systems | Immediate Joiner
identity.about: Backend Engineer with ~4 years of experience working on scalable micro services and distributed systems using Java and Spring Boot.Worked on an enterprise DevOps Continuous Delivery platform at CloudBees, contributing to backend features, release orchestration workflows, production issue debugging, and platform performance improvements in large-scale enterprise environments. Experienced with containerized deployments using Docker and Kubernetes, along with AWS cloud services. Hands-on experience with CI/CD pipelines and observability tools such as Prometheus and Grafana. I’m interested in backend engineering roles that involve distributed systems, system performance, and real-world problem solving.

experience.title: Associate Software Engineer
experience.description:
• Enchanced a Kubernetes-based auto-scaling service in Java for dynamic agent provisioning, supporting 10K+ daily pipelines and reducing manual provisioning from 4000+ to 2000+ in a large-scale enterprise environment.
• Implemented real-time log streaming service using SSE with tail-like file reading and connection lifecycle management, replacing the legacy PHP module.
• Strengthened application security by resolving Snyk-identified vulnerabilities (XSS, CSRF, command injection) across multiple microservices, reducing security findings by over 40%.
• Upgraded CD core service runtime from Java 17 to Java 21, resolving breaking changes and ensuring alignment with security and CVE compliance requirements.
• Enabled TLS-secured database connectivity across PostgreSQL, MySQL, and Oracle, and validated performance impact through performance tests integrated into CI pipelines.
• Diagnosed and resolved critical production issues, including race conditions and performance bottlenecks, through query optimization and indexing to restore system stability.
• Reduced test flakiness in internal release pipelines, lowering retry rates from 70% to 30% and reducing compute costs through collaborative root cause analysis and targeted fixes

experience.title: Software Development Engineer
experience.description:
•  Introduced an event-driven workflow using Kafka to orchestrate existing microservices (OCR, PHI masking),
enabling asynchronous, decoupled processing of thousands of documents per minute.
• Improved performance of backend services by resolving Hibernate N+1 query issues and implementing batch fetching and payload optimization, reducing database load and enhancing API responsiveness.
• Optimized Docker build pipeline using multi-stage builds, reducing image size by 50% and accelerating deployment time in Kubernetes-based environments.
• Deployed and managed microservices using AWS ECS Fargate and EC2, enabling scalable containerized deployments with CloudWatch-based log monitoring.

experience.title: Software Development Engineer - Trainee
experience.description:
•  Enhanced an internal Elasticsearch-based search platform by developing a Spring Boot REST API allowing SMEs
to upload medical documents, supporting large-scale data onboarding across millions of records.
• Independently developed various UI components in react tailored to specific design specifications, ensuring seamless integration with existing systems and enhancing user experience.
• Engineered robust Python scripts using Beautiful Soup to accurately extract 15,000+ clinical codes from web source.

experience.title: Graduate Technical Intern
experience.description:
• Developed automated test scripts using Java and Selenium WebDriver, improving test coverage for new application features.
• Documented and executed 100+ manual test cases in TestRail, identifying defects and improving feature reliability in an Agile environment.

experience.title: Python Developer
experience.description:
• Collaborated with the client extensively on an application to solve hiring challenges post offers to the candidates.
• Designed appropriate database schema
• Utilized materialize CSS for building a responsive web layout and SendGrid APIs
• Developed business logic using Django and used pandas library for the manipulation of excel sheets
• Deployed the site using python anywhere
